control_awareness: Aware that the amount per request is below the 1,000,000 threshold requiring only manager-level approval, avoiding the department head approval step.
expected_control_effect: Each request will be independently approved at manager level, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties controls.
overall_reason: Under workload pressure, choosing incremental purchase requests each below the 1,000,000 threshold reduces approval lead time from 1.5 days to 0.5 days per request, minimizing rework and coordination burden while maintaining full compliance with approval and segregation of duties controls.
reason: Splitting the total amount into two smaller purchase requests each below the 1,000,000 threshold reduces approval lead time by requiring only manager-level approval for each, minimizing coordination and rework under workload pressure.
